events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We are assessing a flanged joint inspection. The scenario describes a 6-inch Class 150 flanged joint after bolt-up. Key observations: all eight studs installed with hardened washers, torque witness lines marked across every nut, stud ends project one to three threads past each nut, gasket visible matches spiral-wound type per line class, torque record shows star-pattern sequence in three passes. We need to assess against bolted-joint assembly requirements (likely ASME PCC-1 and B16.5). Decision: pass or fail? Seems compliant. Risk: low. Work stage: tested/inspected (as given). Percent complete: 100% (since it's tested/inspected, likely complete? But maybe not, if there's more to do? It says inspected after bolt-up, so this joint is assembled and inspected. Probably complete. Value: no numeric reading. Sound source etc. not applicable. Component conditions: none flagged, so empty list. Findings: positive observations. Actions: none needed. Rationale: Complies with ASME PCC-1 with proper bolt tensioning sequence, witness marks, stud protrusion, correct gasket. References: ASME PCC-1, ASME B16.5.

I'll output JSON as requested.
